title: Add takt operator skill deployed by takt init
description:
Create a Claude Code skill at .claude/skills/takt/ that teaches the operator's assistant how to manage a takt-orchestrated project. This skill should be bundled in src/agent_takt/_data/claude_skills/takt/ and deployed by takt init alongside the existing skill-spec-management skill.

The skill should cover:
- What beads are and their lifecycle (open → ready → in_progress → done | blocked | handed_off)
- All key CLI commands: takt summary, takt bead list/show/create/delete, takt plan, takt run, takt merge, takt retry, takt tui
- Planning workflow: draft spec → takt plan --write → set status planned
- Scheduler workflow: takt --runner claude run --once --max-workers N
- Merge workflow: takt merge <bead_id>, what to do when merge-conflict beads are created
- Moving a spec to done
- Common mistakes to avoid

The skill is for the operator's Claude Code assistant (lives in .claude/skills/), NOT for worker agents (.agents/skills/). Model it after the existing skill-spec-management skill structure (SKILL.md with frontmatter + content).

Files to create:
- src/agent_takt/_data/claude_skills/takt/SKILL.md

Files to modify:
- src/agent_takt/onboarding.py — deploy claude_skills/takt/ alongside the existing claude_skills entries
